name: Midjourney
tagline: The gold standard for AI art and image generation
description: Midjourney produces some of the most visually stunning AI-generated images available. Operating via Discord (with a web interface now rolling out), it's the tool of choice for artists, designers, and creatives who want exceptional aesthetic quality. The community and style guide resources make it easier to master than its prompt-driven interface suggests.
pros: Best overall image quality in the market
cons: No direct API for standard users
Can't generate very specific compositions reliably
